eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Medina, TX; at 10:29 AM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 10:29 AM JUL 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Medina County advises DHanis residents the Seco is rising rapidly. Those in flood-prone areas are asked to move to higher ground immediately. Additional information will be released as soon as it becomes available. For shelter information, please contact Emergency Management at 830-455-0129. Monitor Medina County and www.weather.gov for updates.
